development.description: Plugins for code review, pipelines, testing, and implementation workflows

productivity.description: News, automation, scheduling, and workflow tools

publishing.description: Create, QA, and distribute technical content to dev.to, Hashnode, and beyond

creative.description: Ideation, brainstorming, and creative generation tools

research.description: Deep research, fact-checking, and knowledge synthesis tools

delve.description: Autonomous deep research with claim-level verification. Delve runs a 5-stage pipeline (SCAN, DECOMPOSE, DIVE, VERIFY, SYNTHESIZE) that dispatches parallel research subagents, extracts atomic claims, then adversarially verifies each one before producing a synthesis report with quality labels and full source attribution.

content-ops.description: Publish technical articles to dev.to, Hashnode, Twitter/X, and Hacker News without leaving your editor. Includes a deterministic linter that catches em-dashes, tag format errors, and description length before publishing — plus 10 skills for creating, QA-ing, and distributing content from your existing artifacts.

anvil.description: Scaffold, validate, and test Claude Code plugins in seconds. Three commands cover the full plugin lifecycle — from template generation to six deterministic validators that catch schema errors, unsafe hooks, and naming issues before publish.

arbiter.description: Use multiple AI assistants from one interface. Arbiter orchestrates Codex CLI and Gemini CLI inside Claude Code — get parallel answers, take majority votes on decisions, cross-check code, or run 3 independent implementations in parallel and pick the best one.

forge.description: Plugin lifecycle manager for heurema org. Scaffold, verify, register, and manage the full plugin lifecycle with automated quality gates.

genesis.description: Evolve startup ideas through AI-powered natural selection. Three specialized agents run generate-critique-select-refine loops, scoring across 8 dimensions with strategy weights, to surface winners with ICP, monetization model, and week-1 execution plans.

glyph.description: Generate polished terminal demo GIFs from a natural language description. Glyph synthesizes asciicast recordings with realistic typing, configurable themes, and built-in PII auditing — no real shell commands are executed.

herald.description: Local-first news intelligence for AI agents. Herald collects RSS and Hacker News articles, clusters related stories by title similarity, scores by source weight and recency, and generates ranked Markdown briefs — all locally with zero API keys.

reporter.description: Report bugs, request features, and ask questions for any heurema plugin — without leaving Claude Code. Auto-detects your repo from git remote, collects environment context, previews the issue, and submits via gh CLI with clipboard fallback.

signum.description: The code is the easy part. Signum is a contract-first AI development pipeline for Claude Code: spec quality gate (A–F) that blocks weak specs before implementation starts, holdout scenarios the Engineer never sees for blind testing, multi-model audit (Claude + Codex + Gemini in parallel), execution policy enforcement, repo-level invariant contracts, and a self-contained tamper-evident proofpack artifact the AI couldn't game.
